author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Toy Story 5 is "a perfect blend of humor, heart, and that signature Pixar magic."
See the movie featuring Taylor Swift's new original song "I Knew It, I Knew You" in theaters FRIDAY!

► SUBSCRIBE to the channel to get notified when new Pixar videos are posted: https://www.youtube.com/pixar?sub_confirmation=1
